requirements: Play the current game in-browser and use rendered evidence, not assumptions.
Fix customer and waiter sprite frame order so walking does not look backwards.
Add visible movement for customers from the door to the table before seating.
Ensure dish cards and dish images are fully visible and not covered by the counter or overlapping.
Verify the polished game is playable on desktop and mobile.
current_step: Implemented and verified. Build passes; desktop and mobile browser checks show visible, non-overlapping dish cards; full-body sheet sprites only; front-facing idle frames; side-facing walking frames; stationary tables; and drag serving works from a fresh order.
